name: redcap-image-form-creator
label: REDCap Image Form Creator
description: Creates REDCap entry and populates form from uploaded images
author: NACC

dry_run.description: Whether to do a dry run

edc_project_pid.description: Project ID on the AWS REDCap instance for the CLARiTI EDC. 88 for development/construction, 25 for live/production, 188 for testing/QA

apikey_path_prefix.description: The instance specific AWS parameter path prefix for apikey

parameter_path.description: AWS parameter path for REDCap instance
